# Release PR Checklist

## Release Summary

Describe features/fixes included in this release.

## Validation Checklist

- [ ] Build successful
- [ ] Unit tests passed
- [ ] Integration testing completed
- [ ] Regression testing completed
- [ ] QA signoff received
- [ ] No critical/open defects
- [ ] Release version updated

## Deployment Readiness

- [ ] Configuration verified
- [ ] Database changes reviewed
- [ ] Rollback strategy verified

## Risk Assessment

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High

Risk Description:
